notes: Original prompt set for psychological/industrial horror scoring. Avoid tonal heroic progressions.

title_screen_dark_ambient.description: Main menu and title screen dread bed.
variants: oppressive dark ambient drone, atonal low strings, sub rumble, distant metallic resonance, broken tape hiss, sparse ritual pulses, no melody, slow burning dread
claustrophobic title screen atmosphere, detuned choir fragments, bowed metal textures, unstable low frequency pressure, cold industrial reverb tails, unsettling silence pockets
uncanny main menu soundscape, diseased analog synth drones, reversed piano ghosts, granular noise bloom, asymmetric low percussion thumps, no heroic swell
ritual-industrial menu ambience, inhuman breathing layers, cracked bell harmonics, subsonic swell and decay, dark void between events, unresolved tonality

abandoned_hospital_ambience.description: Exploration cue for sterile but decayed spaces.
variants: abandoned hospital corridor ambience, fluorescent hum, distant cart wheel squeak, hollow ventilation drones, degraded monitor pulse, fear of unseen movement
medical horror ambience, leaking steam, resonant tile reflections, muted alarm clicks, low unstable synth bed, faint reverse swells, no steady rhythm
hospital wing at night, antiseptic dread, metallic rattles far away, low heartbeat-like pressure, dissonant air tones, sparse and cold
clinical ruin atmosphere, broken intercom static, rusted door groans, filtered sub drones, occasional sharp scraping stingers, psychological dread
occult chamber drone, ritualistic low chant texture, detuned gongs, whispered reverse tails, infrasonic pressure, ambiguous harmony
stone crypt ritual ambience, dark resonant drones, scraped bronze tones, circling breath noises, sparse impact accents, no tonal resolution
esoteric shrine atmosphere, bowed cymbal moans, sub bass bloom, distorted choral dust, long silences then sudden low movement
forbidden rite soundscape, unstable analog hum, pulsing low tom echoes, distant screaming harmonics, uncanny and diseased
enemy stalking tension cue, irregular ticking pulses, low drone floor, short dissonant string scratches, breathing in darkness, mounting anxiety
predator nearby atmosphere, asymmetrical percussion fragments, detuned synth whispers, bass pressure swells, restrained but escalating terror
hunted in narrow hallways, broken metronome rhythm, granular hiss, metallic friction hits, paranoid and oppressive
shadow pursuit tension, low throbbing pulse, random high-frequency squeals, dissonant cluster tails, no melodic comfort
industrial nightmare chase music, aggressive distorted pulses, mechanical impacts, unstable bass stabs, rapid breathing textures, chaotic but controlled
panic chase in factory labyrinth, slamming metal percussion, detuned synth sirens, frantic sub movement, harsh transient hits
high tension pursuit, grinding machinery rhythm, clipped noise bursts, bent tonal fragments, relentless dread energy
mechanical horror chase cue, asymmetrical drums, harsh reverberant clangs, distorted low engine drone, terrifying momentum
boss encounter dread build, colossal low drones, ritual percussion impacts, dissonant brass-like swells, abyssal pressure, no heroic climax
final confrontation horror score, heavy asymmetrical pulse, cavernous metallic hits, diseased choir texture, terror-laden dynamics
monstrous presence cue, unstable harmonic clusters, deep industrial rumble, sudden stinger strikes, oppressive and fatal
endgame horror ritual, dark orchestra textures corrupted by noise, sub drops, infernal percussion, unstable unresolved ending
short horror stinger, violent dissonant hit, reversed inhale into sharp impact, metallic crack, immediate silence
jump scare one-shot, atonal cluster stab, sub thump, glassy scrape, rapid decay
terror impact cue, distorted brass scream, low frequency slam, tape stop tail, brutal transient
shock stinger, ritual bell strike with detuned burst, noise blast, abrupt cutoff, no melody
post death void ambience, empty low drones, distant ringing, reversed noise tails, emotional numbness, cold darkness
game over aftermath, decaying sub pressure, hollow metallic echoes, static haze, near silence with faint pulse
failed run ambience, spectral granular wash, crushed piano fragments, distant mechanical moan, bleak unresolved tone
afterlife corridor soundscape, thin high hiss, subterranean rumble, collapsing reverb tails, oppressive stillness
